//: Typecheck-only config for `npm test`. It inherits tsconfig.json but drops the "../" entry from `exclude`. A bare `tsc --noEmit` against tsconfig.json fails with TS18003 ("No inputs were found") because "../" resolves to the repo root — an ANCESTOR of web/ — so every included file is also matched by the exclude and tsc sees zero inputs. `next build` is unaffected (Next injects its own file discovery). This config is what makes standalone typechecking work; tsconfig.json itself is left intentionally unchanged.
